about.pageSubtitle: Discover the story behind BrassCraft Industries — three decades of precision, innovation, and global excellence in brass manufacturing.

overview.title: Our Story
overview.description: Founded in 1995 in the heart of India's brass capital — Jamnagar, Gujarat — BrassCraft Industries has grown from a small workshop to a global manufacturer and exporter of precision brass components. Our state-of-the-art facility spans over 50,000 sq ft, equipped with the latest CNC turning centers, forging presses, and quality testing equipment.
overview.description2: Today, we serve clients in 45+ countries across industries including plumbing, HVAC, automotive, electrical, pneumatic, and hydraulic applications. Our commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction has made us a trusted partner for leading brands worldwide.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To manufacture and deliver world-class brass components that exceed international quality standards, while maintaining sustainable practices and fostering long-term partnerships with our clients.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the most trusted and preferred global supplier of precision brass components, recognized for innovation, quality excellence, and environmental responsibility.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: Zero compromise on quality from raw material to finished product.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Continuously investing in technology and processes to stay ahead.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: Transparent business practices and ethical conduct in all operations.

customerFocus.title: Customer Focus
customerFocus.description: Understanding and exceeding customer expectations at every touchpoint.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Minimizing environmental impact through responsible manufacturing.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.description: Empowering our team to achieve collective excellence.

milestones.title: Our Journey
milestones.subtitle: Key milestones in our three decades of growth and excellence.

team.subtitle: Meet the experienced professionals driving BrassCraft Industries forward.

capabilities.title: Manufacturing Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: State-of-the-art processes ensuring precision, quality, and efficiency in every component we produce.

quality.pageSubtitle: Our commitment to quality is reflected in every component we manufacture, backed by rigorous testing and international certifications.

process.title: Our Quality Process
process.subtitle: A comprehensive 4-stage quality control system ensuring zero-defect manufacturing.

incoming.title: Incoming Inspection
incoming.description: Raw material verification using spectrometer analysis and dimensional checks to ensure material compliance.

inProcess.title: In-Process Control
inProcess.description: Real-time monitoring during CNC machining with statistical process control and dimensional verification.

final.title: Final Inspection
final.description: 100% inspection of critical dimensions using CMM, gauges, and surface finish testing equipment.

dispatch.title: Pre-Dispatch Audit
dispatch.description: Final quality audit with documentation, packaging verification, and traceability records.

equipment.title: Testing Equipment
equipment.subtitle: Advanced laboratory equipment ensuring precision and compliance.

privacy.intro: BrassCraft Industries is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide, including your name, email address, phone number, company name, and any details you share through our contact and quote request forms.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use the collected information to respond to your inquiries, process quote requests, improve our website and services, and send relevant industry updates with your consent.

protection.title: Data Protection
protection.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: Our website may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@brasscraftindustries.com.

home.title: BrassCraft Industries — Premium Brass Components Manufacturer
home.description: Leading manufacturer and global exporter of precision brass fittings, valves, connectors, fasteners, and turned parts. ISO 9001 certified. 45+ export countries.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Discover BrassCraft Industries — 30+ years of excellence in brass manufacturing. ISO certified, 500+ employees, exporting to 45+ countries from Jamnagar, India.

products.title: Our Products
products.description: Explore 55+ precision brass components including fittings, valves, connectors, fasteners, inserts, turned parts, and more. Custom OEM/ODM solutions available.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Comprehensive brass manufacturing services — CNC machining, forging, quality testing, OEM/ODM solutions, surface treatment, and global export packaging.

quality.title: Quality Assurance
quality.description: Our rigorous 4-stage quality control process ensures zero-defect brass components. ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001, CE, RoHS certified.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: State-of-the-art 50,000 sq ft manufacturing facility with 25+ CNC machines, quality lab, and monthly capacity of 1M+ pieces.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, CE Marking, RoHS Compliance, REACH — meeting the highest international quality and environmental standards.

blog.title: Blog & News
blog.description: Latest insights, industry trends, and news from BrassCraft Industries. Expert articles on brass manufacturing, materials science, and engineering.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with BrassCraft Industries for brass component inquiries, custom quotes, and technical support. Located in Jamnagar, Gujarat, India.
